description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 7th; Weight â; Price +1 Bonus DESCRIPTION A shield with this ability flashes with a brilliant light up to twice per day upon command of the wielder. Except for the wielder, anyone within 20 feet must make a successful DC 14 Reflex save or be blinded for 1d4 rounds. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells searing light; Cost +1 bonus
